dict.string: お気に入りのフォルダをVSCode・Zed・WezTermで開くワークフロー

#!/bin/zsh set -euo pipefail
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH"
mode="${mode:-${1:-vs}}" dir="${dir:-}"
if [[ -z "$dir" ]]; then osascript -e 'display notification "dirが渡ってきていません" with title "Open VS or IT"' exit 1 fi
if [[ "$mode" == "vs" ]]; then open -a "Visual Studio Code" "$dir" exit 0 fi
if [[ "$mode" == "zed" ]]; then open -a "Zed" "$dir" exit 0 fi
if [[ "$mode" == "wez" ]]; then if [[ ! -d "$dir" ]]; then osascript -e 'display notification "指定された dir が存在しません" with title "Open VS or IT"' exit 1 fi
dir="$(cd "$dir" && pwd -P)" ws_name="$(basename "$dir")"
wez_app="WezTerm" if [[ -d "/Applications/WezTerm Nightly.app" ]]; then wez_app="WezTerm Nightly" fi
# WezTerm 未起動なら起動して待機 if ! wezterm cli list &>/dev/null; then open -a "$wez_app" for i in {1..50}; do wezterm cli list &>/dev/null && break sleep 0.1 done fi
# トリガーファイルを書いて WezTerm 側で SwitchToWorkspace を実行させる printf '{"name":"%s","cwd":"%s"}' "$ws_name" "$dir" > /tmp/wezterm-alfred-workspace.json open -a "$wez_app" exit 0 fi

#!/usr/bin/env python3 import json, sys
target = (sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "").strip()
if not target: print(json.dumps({"items":[{"title":"選択フォルダが取得できません（引数が空です）","valid":False}]}, ensure_ascii=False)) raise SystemExit
items = [ {"title":"vs で開く（VSCode）", "subtitle":target, "arg":"vs", "variables":{"mode":"vs", "dir":target}}, {"title":"zed で開く（Zed）", "subtitle":target, "arg":"zed", "variables":{"mode":"zed", "dir":target}}, {"title":"wez で開く（WezTerm ワークスペース）", "subtitle":target, "arg":"wez", "variables":{"mode":"wez", "dir":target}}, ]
print(json.dumps({"items": items}, ensure_ascii=False))
